name: Rabbit Simulator
short_description: In a beautiful island, as a bunny, collect some carrots and run around! ᕱ⑅ᕱ This is a simple and relaxing bunny walking simulator game. Your only goal is to collect as many carrots as possible.
detailed_description:
Hello everyone, I love Bunny. One day my head suddenly asked me, why not make a full 3D bunny game? I thought about it and thought it was a good idea, so this game was born.

This is a simple and relaxing bunny walking simulator game. Your only goal is to collect as many carrots as possible.

Game Features

  • Warm game atmosphere.
  • A wide variety of bunny customization options, including body and skin.
  • Can physically interact with carrots.
  • Steam achievements support.
  • Steam leaderboard support.

Game Play


  • Eat when you are hungry.
  • Collect carrots constantly.
  • Give the other rabbits a carrot and lead the other rabbits to run around.

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Polish, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal
